ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather event */,
  "dates" TEXT /* Date range during which the event occurred */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the weather event in hours */,
  "max_edf5" REAL /* Maximum EDF5 value recorded during the event */,
  "max30" REAL /* Maximum 30-minute rainfall during the event */,
  "total_mm" REAL /* Total millimeters of precipitation recorded */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season during which the event occurred */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the event occurred */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the weather event */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the recorded data */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Status of the data validation */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the event data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_events_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_events_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., Winter 2000-2001) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year associated with the season */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of seasonal characteristics */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location in meters */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Time zone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type (e.g., Storm, Drizzle) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_records" (
  "temp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather event associated with the record */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded during the event */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded during the event */,
  "avg_temp" REAL /* Average temperature recorded during the event */,
  "temperature_unit" TEXT /* Unit of temperature measurement (e.g., Celsius, Fahrenheit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_records_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES weather_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precipitation_types" (
  "precip_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precipitation type */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather event associated with the precipitation type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the precipitation type (e.g., Rain, Snow) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the precipitation characteristics */,
  "intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the precipitation (e.g., mm/h) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precip_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precipitation_types_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES weather_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather event being reported */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* Name of the individual or organization reporting the event */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., initial, updated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES weather_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, researcher) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather event being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the event data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES weather_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather event associated with the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert issued (e.g., Warning, Advisory) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message detailing the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was issued */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_alerts_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES weather_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_stations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_events" (
  "station_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station event */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station that recorded the event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather event */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date when the event was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_events_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_events_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES weather_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data validation entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather event being validated */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation was performed */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of the validation (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the validation process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES weather_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather event being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_comments_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES weather_events ("event_id")
)
